description.value: Third-party coverage describes PRANA as a Russian IIoT predictive analytics and remote monitoring system developed by ROTEC.
description.snippet: PRANA is the first Russia's predictive analytics and remote monitoring IIoT system. It was developed by ROTEC JSC

segment.value: AI/ML / Industrial enterprise AI automation software
segment.snippet: new version ... featuring elements of artificial intelligence and machine learning

latest_news.value: Third-party page states PRANA switched to Yandex ClickHouse in 2021 and monitored more than 130 sophisticated industrial equipment units as of 2021.
latest_news.snippet: In 2021, PRANA switched over to Yandex ClickHouse ... monitored more than 130 pieces
